symptoms.symptom_name: Annular scaly advancing-border plaques with central clearing, expanding

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Annular plaques with a raised scaly advancing border and central clearing are characteristic of tinea corporis.
EM is smooth/non-scaly and usually not itchy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Topical steroid use accelerating spread (tinea incognito)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Steroid-driven spread with loss of typical morphology indicates tinea incognito.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Clinical diagnosis (± skin scraping/KOH if uncertain)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Tinea is usually clinical; scraping confirms if unclear (esp. steroid-modified).
